title: S.O.1853(E)-Constitution of Tribunal for declaring LTTE as an unlawful association
description: S.O.1853(E)-Constitution of Tribunal for declaring LTTE as an unlawful association

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 1656] ubZ fnYyh] lkseokj] ebZ 27] 2019@T;s"B 6] 1941 No. 1656] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, MAY 27, 2019/ JYAISTHA 6, 1941 गृह गृह गृह गृह मं灴ालय मं灴ालय मं灴ालय मं灴ालय अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना अिधसूचना नई 琈द瀖ली, 27 , 27 , 27 , 27 मई, 2019 , 2019 , 2019 , 2019 का का का का....आ आ आ आ.... 1853 1853 1853 1853(अअअअ).).).).—िलबरेशन टाइगस榁 ऑफ़ तिमल ईलम (एलटीटीई) को भारत के राजप灴,,,, असाधारण,,,, भाग II, खंड 3,,,, उपखंड (ii) म犆 灹कािशत अिधसूचना सं榐या का.आ. 1730(अ),,,, तारीख 14 मई,,,, 2019 獧ारा िविधिव牱獳 संगम के 牲प म犆 घोिषत 琈कया गया है;;;; अतः अब,,,, क犆灶ीय सरकार,,,, िविधिव牱獳 琈灙याकलाप (िनवारण) अिधिनयम,,,, 1967 (1967 का 37) क琉 धारा 5 क琉 उप-धारा (1) 獧ारा 灹द瀄牵 शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए,,,, 瀈यायिनण榁यन करने के 灹योजन के िलए 琈क 榉या िलबरेशन टाइगस榁 ऑफ़ तिमल ईलम को ‘‘‘‘िविधिव牱獳 संगम’’’’ के 牲प म犆 घोिषत करने का पया榁玅 कारण है या नह牷,,,, 琈द瀖ली उ獀 瀈यायालय के आसीन 瀈यायाधीश माननीया 瀈यायमू琔त सु炈ी संगीता ढ牷गरा सहगल क琉 अ瀇य楹ता म犆 ‘‘‘‘िविधिव牱獳 琈灙याकलाप (िनवारण) अिधकरण’’’’ का गठन करती है |||| [फा.सं. 11034/4/2018----सीटी-II] पीयूष गोयल,,,, संयु榉त सिचव MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th May, 2019 S.O. 1853(E).─Whereas, the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam has been declared as an unlawful association, vide, notification number S.O. 1730 (E), dated the 14th May, 2019, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii); Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967 (37 of 1967), the Central Government hereby constitutes the ‘Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Tribunal’, consisting of Ms. Justice Sangita Dhingra Sehgal, Hon’ble sitting Judge, High Court of Delhi, for the purpose of adjudicating whether or not there is sufficient cause for declaring the Liberation Tigers of Tamil Eelam as an unlawful association. [F.No.11034/4/2018-CT-II] PIYUSH GOYAL, Jt. Secy. 2650 GI/2019 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
